sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: │‘Almost Like a Religion’: Pfizer CEO Slams RFK Jr.’s ‘Anti-Science’ Vaccine Policies
feed.summary: │Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla criticized U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s "anti-science" approach to vaccine policies, stating that discussions around vaccines become challenging with Kennedy due to what Bourla describes as "almost like a religion there." Bourla's comments come as vaccine sales have declined, with companies attributing this trend to macro factors and lower vaccination rates, coinciding with controversial policy changes and rhetoric from Kennedy's Department of Health and Human Services. Kennedy has questioned vaccine safety, removed COVID-19 vaccines from routine guidelines for some groups, and faced scrutiny over claims made by an FDA official regarding vaccine-related deaths.

feed.title: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) Posts Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.13 EPS
feed.summary: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst expectations with $1.57 EPS against an estimated $1.44, and revenues of $11.90 billion, exceeding the $11.27 billion forecast. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.36 per share and disclosed recent insider stock sales as well as institutional investor activity. Analyst ratings remain largely positive, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $314.00.

feed.title: Copart, Inc. $CPRT Shares Purchased by Wilkins Investment Counsel Inc.
feed.summary: Wilkins Investment Counsel Inc. significantly increased its stake in Copart, Inc. ($CPRT) by 517% in the third quarter, totaling 84,910 shares valued at approximately $3.82 million. This comes despite insider sales by CEO Jeffrey Liaw and Director Thomas Tryforos, leading to insiders owning about 9.6% of the company. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a consensus of "Moderate Buy" and a target price of $47.60, while the stock currently trades around $41.31.

feed.title: Abbott Dives 7% On Quarterly Upset As Exact Close Looms
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) stock dropped 7% after the health giant reported fourth-quarter adjusted income of $1.50 per share on $11.46 billion in sales, missing analyst sales expectations of $11.8 billion. This occurs as a $23 billion buyout deal with Exact Sciences (EXAS) is nearing completion. The company's fourth-quarter earnings per share matched analyst estimates, but the sales figure fell short, impacting investor confidence.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Maintains IDEXX Laboratories Inc(IDXX.US) With Hold Rating, Maintains Target Price $775
feed.summary: Piper Sandler analyst David Westenberg has reiterated a Hold rating for IDEXX Laboratories Inc (IDXX.US), keeping the target price at $775. Westenberg has a 55.5% success rate and an average return of 16.0% over the past year, according to TipRanks data. The analysis provided is for informational purposes and not an investment recommendation.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical Earnings on Deck – (ISRG) Stock Drops Below Support Leading In
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) stock has dropped below $550 ahead of its Q4 2025 earnings report, despite preliminary Q4 revenue exceeding expectations. Investors are focusing on the moderated 2026 da Vinci procedure growth guidance of 13-15%, which is lower than the 18% growth seen in Q4 2025. The upcoming earnings call will be crucial for management to clarify 2026 growth outlook and gross margin guidance, as the stock trades at a premium valuation requiring sustained performance.

feed.title: STEPH JACKSON TO RETIRE FROM T. ROWE PRICE INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT
feed.summary: Steph Jackson, head of T. Rowe Price Investment Management (TRPIM) and Management Committee member, is retiring at the end of 2026 after a distinguished career since 2007, significantly contributing to the firm's growth and the establishment of TRPIM in 2022. Steven Krichbaum will become associate head of TRPIM immediately and succeed Jackson as head on January 1, 2027, ensuring a smooth transition. Krichbaum brings nearly two decades of investment experience, including pivotal roles in TRPIM's creation.

feed.title: Corteva, Inc. $CTVA Shares Sold by Wilkins Investment Counsel Inc.
feed.summary: Wilkins Investment Counsel Inc. reduced its stake in Corteva, Inc. by 5.5% in the third quarter, selling 18,550 shares and now holding 321,502 shares valued at $21.74 million. Despite this, Corteva remains its 8th largest holding. Conversely, other institutional investors like PGGM, Assenagon, and Schroder Investment Management Group significantly increased their positions in the company, bringing the total institutional ownership to 81.54%.

feed.title: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB Reduces Stake in Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc $KDP
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB significantly cut its holdings in Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc (NASDAQ:KDP) by 92.9% in the 3rd quarter, reducing its stake to 5,090 shares valued at $130,000. This comes as other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc., State Street Corp, and Invesco Ltd. increased their positions in the company. An insider sale by VP Angela A. Stephens was also reported, alongside recent analyst ratings that generally lean towards "Moderate Buy" for KDP.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX) reported a fourth-quarter profit of $406 million, or 28 cents per share, which exceeded Wall Street expectations. Adjusted earnings were 47 cents per share. The mining company also surpassed revenue forecasts, posting $5.63 billion for the quarter and $25.92 billion for the full year with a profit of $2.2 billion.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan Posts Profit Gains Despite Sharply Lower Production
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan reported increased profits in the fourth quarter despite a significant drop in production due to an ongoing mine suspension. Higher prices for precious metals were a key factor in boosting the company's net income to $406 million, or 28 cents per share, compared to $274 million, or 19 cents per share, in the prior year. Revenue for the quarter was $5.63 billion, exceeding Wall Street's expectations.

feed.title: BMS Bets $850M on Janux’s Tumor-Activated Drugs, Deepening Cancer Investments
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMS) has entered into a partnership with Janux Therapeutics, investing up to $850 million to co-develop tumor-activated T-cell engager therapies for cancer. This collaboration aims to overcome the systemic toxicities associated with traditional T-cell engagers by utilizing Janux's proprietary platform, which ensures the drug is only activated in the tumor's vicinity. This move further deepens BMS's recent significant investments in cancer research and development, including previous deals with Harbour BioMed and Orbital Therapeutics.

feed.title: Avery Dennison Q3 EPS Forecast Reduced by Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q3 2026 earnings per share forecast for Avery Dennison (NYSE: AVY) to $2.56, down from $2.57. Despite this slight reduction, several other brokerages have recently upgraded their ratings and increased price targets for the industrial products company. Avery Dennison also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.94, payable on December 17th, equating to a 2.0% dividend yield.

feed.title: American Rebel Holdings stock pops premarket as AREB sets Feb. 2 1-for-20 reverse split
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings (AREB) saw its stock surge about 20% in premarket trading after announcing a 1-for-20 reverse stock split effective February 2nd. The split aims to address Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement and will reduce the number of outstanding common shares while potentially boosting the share price. The company also disclosed a new promissory note and debt-for-equity transactions, highlighting recent capital structure adjustments.

feed.title: After 24 years at Arch Capital, ex-CFO John Vollaro plans board exit
feed.summary: John Vollaro, who served as CFO and EVP of Arch Capital for seven years and on its board for 17, will not seek re-election at the upcoming Annual Meeting of Shareholders, ending his tenure on May 5, 2026. The company's leadership, including Board Chair John Pasquesi and CEO Nicolas Papadopoulo, praised his significant contributions over 24 years, highlighting his role in the company's growth and value delivery. Vollaro expressed his gratitude for being part of Arch Capital's success story.

feed.title: Olympiad Research LP Purchases Shares of 4,964 Electronic Arts Inc. $EA
feed.summary: Olympiad Research LP recently acquired 4,964 shares of Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA), valued at approximately $1.00 million, making EA its 8th largest holding and representing 1.4% of the firm's portfolio. This comes as institutional ownership of EA is high at 90.23%, though company insiders have been net sellers, offloading over 123,000 shares worth nearly $25 million in the past 90 days. Despite the institutional investment, EA recently missed Q3 earnings expectations and has received mostly "Hold" ratings from analysts, with a target price of $184.36.

feed.title: Taco Bell’s Crispy Chicken Nuggets are back
feed.summary: Taco Bell is bringing back its Crispy Chicken Nuggets for a limited time starting January 22, accompanied by a new dipping sauce made in partnership with Hidden Valley Ranch. This move continues Taco Bell’s strategy of leveraging cyclical LTOs to drive sales growth and capitalize on the ongoing consumer interest in chicken platforms, as evidenced by 70 million crispy chicken menu items sold since their initial launch. The reintroduction aims to enhance the chain's menu with novelty and expand everyday occasions, further insulating it from competition in the growing chicken segment.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan Stock Falls on Earnings Despite Rising Copper and Gold Prices
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) shares dropped despite the copper and gold miner reporting better-than-expected quarterly earnings and revenue. This decline occurred even with rising prices for copper and gold. The article highlights the unexpected fall in stock price despite positive financial performance.

feed.title: Freeport Says It’s on Track to Restart Indonesia Copper Mine After Deadly Mudslide
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. announced it is on track to restart its Indonesian copper mine following a deadly mudslide in September. Two unaffected areas of the mine were restarted in November, and the company plans a phased restart of an underground area in the second quarter of this year, with copper production expected to ramp up through 2027. This operation is crucial to global copper supply.

feed.title: Athene Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Fixed Income Investor Call
feed.summary: Athene, a subsidiary of Apollo Global Management, announced it will host a Fixed Income Investor Call on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 10:00 AM ET. Senior management will discuss business trends, new business origination, the investment portfolio, and capital. A webcast will be available on the Investor Relations section of Athene's website.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) Misses Q4 CY2025 Revenue Estimates, Stock Drops
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) reported Q4 CY2025 revenues of $11.46 billion, missing analyst estimates, although its non-GAAP EPS was in line. The company's stock dropped following the announcement. Despite the revenue miss, Abbott Laboratories achieved double-digit earnings per share growth and expanded margins in 2025, driven by a productive new product pipeline.

feed.title: Northern Trust Corp. (NASDAQ:NTRS) Beats Q4 Earnings Estimates Despite Muted Market Reaction
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corp. (NTRS) exceeded Q4 earnings and revenue estimates with revenue of $2.14 billion and non-GAAP EPS of $2.69. Despite the strong financial performance, the market's initial reaction was muted, possibly due to broader economic concerns, sector-specific headwinds, or already factored-in expectations. Investors are now looking to analyst estimates for 2026 and management's future commentary to gauge the sustainability of growth.

feed.title: Prepare for Long-Term Goals During Good Times - Raymond James - Commentaries
feed.summary: During periods of strong market performance, such as the double-digit returns seen in recent years, investors often accumulate significant wealth. This article from Raymond James advises investors to leverage these good times to refocus on long-term goals and rebalance portfolios. It suggests securing adequate income and cash flow for retirement by shifting some accumulated wealth into wealth preservation assets like individual bonds, especially for those at or near retirement age.

feed.title: Hudson Edge Investment Partners Inc. Boosts Stock Position in ONEOK, Inc. $OKE

This move comes as ONEOK recently raised its quarterly dividend to $1.07 per share, yielding 5.6%, and reported strong Q3 earnings beating analyst estimates. feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) soars to all-time high as 2 analysts turn bullish
feed.summary: The article reports that Western Digital (WDC) stock has reached an all-time high. This surge is attributed to two analysts issuing bullish ratings on the company.

feed.title: Dow stock steadies in premarket after a near-7% jump, with earnings next week in focus
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE: DOW) shares are stabilizing in premarket trading after a significant 6.9% jump the previous day, spurred by news that tariffs against European allies would be held off. Investors are now keenly focused on the company's upcoming fourth-quarter earnings webcast on January 29th for insights into industrial demand, volumes, pricing, and the impact of its cost-cutting efforts in Europe. The market will be watching if Wednesday's rebound can be sustained and how policy news continues to affect cyclical stocks.

feed.title: Tilray Medical Italia launches
feed.summary: Tilray Medical has launched Tilray Medical Italia, formerly FL Group, to strengthen its presence in Italy's regulated medical cannabis market. This move aligns its operations under a single global brand and reinforces its commitment to providing high-quality medical cannabis products to patients and healthcare systems in Italy. The company will continue its partnership with Molteni to support physician education, prescribing, and patient access while upholding stringent quality and safety standards.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares Inc (NASDAQ:HBAN) Stock Falls After Q4 2025 Revenue and EPS Miss Estimates
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares Inc (NASDAQ:HBAN) reported Q4 2025 financial results that missed analyst estimates for both revenue and EPS, leading to a 3.8% drop in pre-market trading. Despite the company highlighting strong organic growth and credit performance for the full year, the quarterly shortfall overshadowed these positives. Investors will now focus on the upcoming earnings call for further insights and any adjustments to future guidance.

feed.title: Does Analysts’ Defense Optimism Plus E‑Z‑GO’s 2027 Liberty Launch Change The Bull Case For Textron (TXT)?
feed.summary: Textron Inc. is gaining investor attention due to growing analyst optimism for its aerospace and defense operations, alongside the upcoming 2027 launch of its redesigned E-Z-GO Liberty vehicle. While the defense sector is a key short-term catalyst, the E-Z-GO release reinforces Textron's ability to refresh products across its diversified portfolio. The company's investment narrative focuses on its ability to convert its varied segments into profits, despite risks like slower growth forecasts and lower return on equity.

feed.title: QUALCOMM INC (NASDAQ:QCOM) Stands Out as a Quality Dividend Stock for Income Investors
feed.summary: QUALCOMM INC (QCOM) has been identified as a strong dividend stock through a systematic screening process focusing on appealing dividends, financial soundness, and future payment potential. The company boasts a consistent dividend history of over ten years, a current yield of 2.21%, and a five-year dividend growth rate of 6.56%. Qualcomm's robust profitability (ChartMill Profitability Rating of 8) and solid financial health (ChartMill Health Rating of 7) further support its ability to maintain and potentially increase these payouts, making it an attractive option for income-focused investors.

feed.title: $231.89 TER Teradyne NASDAQ Pre-Market 22 Jan 2026: AI demand signal

Despite healthy margins and cash flow, the stock has an elevated valuation with a trailing PE of 84.02.
